'''Arnet''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was a veteran [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]]. He piloted the Walker [[Blizzard Scout 1]] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], and later [[Tempest Scout 1]] in [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Biography==
'''Arnet''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] veteran [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], who commanded the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]] [[Blizzard Scout 1]] in [[General/Legends|General]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Veers]]' [[Blizzard Force/Legends|Blizzard Force]] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref name="CCG" /> During the battle, Much of Blizzard Force was destroyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[T-47 airspeeder|snowspeeders]], including the [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT Walkers]] [[Blizzard 2/Legends|Blizzard 2]] and [[Blizzard 4/Legends|Blizzard 4]]<ref name="TESB">{{Film|V}}</ref>. Ultimately, the battle would end in a tactical victory, though strategic failure for the Imperials.<ref name="TESB" />

Earning the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]]<ref name="CCG" /> by the year [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]<ref name="New Essential Chronolgy">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of ''Return of the Jedi'' to the year 4 ABY.</ref>, Arnet piloted the enclosed AT-ST walker [[Tempest Scout 1]].<ref name="Tempest Scout 1 CCG">{{CCG|set=Endor Limited|cardname=Tempest Scout 1}}</ref> After the ambush of the [[Endor shield generator bunker]], which was protecting the under construction Imperial battlestation, the [[Death Star II/Legends|''Death Star II'']], Tempest Scout 1 was present near the bunker.<ref name="Tempest Scout 1 CCG" /><ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref> Arnet was assigned to coordinate the surprise counterattack in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. However, the battle would become a victory for the Alliance.<ref name="ROTJ" />

==Personality and traits==
Arnet was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with [[Color/Legends|light]] skin.<ref name="CCG" />

==Equipment==
As an AT-ST driver, Arnet wore a gray jumpsuit, and a dark green and black [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] with a chinstrap and [[Goggles/Legends|goggles]].<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Arnet's name was first established by his character card in the [[1999]] ''[[Endor Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]],<ref name="CCG" /> with the name's simultaneous mention in the text for a card for his AT-ST, Tempest Scout 1, released in the same set.<ref name="Tempest Scout 1 CCG" />

Although the Tempest Scout 1 card identifies the walker as one of the AT-STs seen during the onset of the Battle of Endor<ref name="Tempest Scout 1 CCG" /> of the [[1983]] film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']],<ref name="ROTJ" /> it is difficult to tell if the walker's onscreen occupant is the same actor used for the "Lieutenant Arnet" CCG card.<ref name="CCG" /> As the "Tempest Scout 1" card does not identify the individual as Arnet<ref name="Tempest Scout 1 CCG" /> this article avoids linking Arnet to the ''Return of the Jedi'' movie actor, and treats the Customizable Card Game's "Lieutenant Arnet" and "Tempest Scout 1" cards as the licensed ''[[Star Wars]]'' products that first introduced the character.<ref name="CCG" />
